layouts.usage: Pick when opening the deck — client name, engagement title, date, and logo.

regions.slot.image: top-right; client or project logo image
regions.slot.title: upper-left; main deck title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.subtitle: below title; short supporting line
regions.slot.body: lower-left; date, presenter, or role line

layouts.usage: Pick when starting a new chapter or major topic break.

regions.slot.subtitle: below section title; optional context line

layouts.usage: Pick when listing the meeting outline or table of contents.

regions.slot.title: top; agenda heading (e.g. "Agenda" or "Contents")
regions.slot.body-left: main area; bullet list of topics or sections

layouts.usage: Pick for a standard content slide — action title plus full-width body.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.body-left: full-width body below title; bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick when the slide needs only a headline — no body content.
Pick when a subtitle line sits between the action title and body.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.subtitle: below title; short subtitle or framing line
regions.slot.body-left: main area below subtitle; bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick when showing part-to-whole composition over categories with a narrative aside.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.chart-title: above chart; chart name and unit line
regions.slot.chart: left half; pre-authored stacked-column chart (data-swap only)
regions.slot.body-right: right half; narrative bullets or text beside the chart

layouts.usage: Pick when comparing series side-by-side across categories with a narrative aside.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.chart-title: above chart; chart name and unit line
regions.slot.chart: left half; pre-authored clustered-column chart (data-swap only)
regions.slot.body-right: right half; narrative bullets or text beside the chart

layouts.usage: Pick when showing a trend or time series with a narrative aside.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.chart-title: above chart; chart name and unit line
regions.slot.chart: left half; pre-authored line chart (data-swap only)
regions.slot.body-right: right half; narrative bullets or text beside the chart

layouts.usage: Pick when plotting x/y/size triples (e.g. risk–return maps) with a narrative aside.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.chart-title: above chart; chart name and unit line
regions.slot.chart: left half; pre-authored bubble chart (data-swap only)
regions.slot.body-right: right half; narrative bullets or text beside the chart

layouts.usage: Pick when comparing two parallel points, lists, or blocks side by side.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.body-left: left column; bullets, text, callout, or image
regions.slot.body-right: right column; bullets, text, callout, or image

layouts.usage: Pick when a wide main narrative sits beside a narrow accent column (Contrast 1).

regions.slot.title: top-left; action title spanning the wide column
regions.slot.body-left: wide left column; main narrative content
regions.slot.body-right: narrow right column; accent bullets or callout

layouts.usage: Pick for equal two-column comparison with a subtitle row per column (Contrast 2).

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.body-left: left column; bullets, text, or callout
regions.slot.body-right: right column; bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick when a left sidebar title frames a wide content pane (Contrast 4).

regions.slot.title: left sidebar; vertical accent title
regions.slot.subtitle-1: left sidebar below title; first subtitle line
regions.slot.body: wide right pane; main bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick when comparing three parallel columns each with its own subhead.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.body-left: left column; bullets, text, or callout
regions.slot.body-center: centre column; bullets, text, or callout
regions.slot.body-right: right column; bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick for a minimal title plus single full-width body — no footer source strip.

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.body-left: full-width body below title; bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick for two-column comparison with subheads on a white-background variant (less-common).

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.body-left: left column; bullets, text, or callout
regions.slot.body-right: right column; bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick when the consultant will add custom content manually — footer only.

regions.slot.source: footer centre; optional source citation strip

layouts.usage: Pick for a cover slide on the white-background variant (less-common).

regions.slot.title: upper area; main deck title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.subtitle: below title; short supporting line
regions.slot.body: lower area; date, presenter, or role line

layouts.usage: Pick for a chapter break on the white-background variant (less-common).

regions.slot.subtitle: below section title; optional context line

layouts.usage: Pick for an agenda slide on the white-background variant (less-common).

regions.slot.title: top; agenda heading (e.g. "Agenda" or "Contents")
regions.slot.body-left: main area; bullet list of topics or sections

layouts.usage: Pick for sidebar-callout on the inverse colour variant (less-common).

regions.slot.title: left sidebar; vertical accent title
regions.slot.subtitle-1: left sidebar below title; first subtitle line
regions.slot.body: wide right pane; main bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick for narrative-with-sidebar on the high-contrast variant (less-common).

regions.slot.title: top-left; action title spanning the wide column
regions.slot.body-left: wide left column; main narrative content
regions.slot.body-right: narrow right column; accent bullets or callout

layouts.usage: Pick for two-column-with-subheads on the high-contrast variant (less-common).

regions.slot.title: top band; action title (8–15 words)
regions.slot.body-left: left column; bullets, text, or callout
regions.slot.body-right: right column; bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick for sidebar-callout on the high-contrast variant (less-common).

regions.slot.title: left sidebar; vertical accent title
regions.slot.subtitle-1: left sidebar below title; first subtitle line
regions.slot.body: wide right pane; main bullets, text, or callout

layouts.usage: Pick for sidebar-callout on the high-contrast inverse variant (less-common).

regions.slot.title: left sidebar; vertical accent title
regions.slot.subtitle-1: left sidebar below title; first subtitle line
regions.slot.body: wide right pane; main bullets, text, or callout
